description: Style Note For the non-conformist high-fashion male, this pair of shoes from red tape is the right choice. Styled in genuine, soft leather for optimal comfort, this pair does not compromise on its style quotient. Wear this with washed black jeans or corduroy trousers, a black leather belt, a casual shirt with a scarf. This off-duty ensemble is perfect to wear for coffee dates in the evenings. Product Details Brown square shaped slip-on with leather upper, overlays and stitched detailing on the seams of the toe Padded tongue and inner Outsole adhered to the upper Textured TPU outsole with a stacked heel and stitched detailing on the forefoot Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
